description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.

description: village in Cook County, Illinois, United States
description_wiki: Glenview is a village in Cook County, Illinois, United States.

description: naval training base for the United States Navy, outside of Chicago, Illinois
description_wiki: Naval Station Great Lakes (NAVSTA Great Lakes) is the home of the United States Navy's only current boot camp, located near North Chicago, in Lake County, Illinois, along Lake Michigan.

description: human settlement in Jacksonville, Florida, United States of America
armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

description: country in southern Africa
description_wiki: South Africa, officially the Republic of South Africa (RSA), is the southernmost country in Africa.

description: sovereign state situated on an island in the Caribbean Sea
description_wiki: Cuba, officially the Republic of Cuba, is an island country in the Caribbean.

description: country in South America
description_wiki: Brazil, officially the Federative Republic of Brazil, is the largest country in South America.

description: city in the Western Cape, South Africa
description_wiki: Cape Town is the legislative capital of South Africa.

description: American businessman and U.S. senator (1919–2011)
description_wiki: Charles Harting Percy (September 27, 1919 – September 17, 2011), also known as Chuck Percy, was an American businessman and politician.

description: upper house of the United States Congress
description_wiki: The United States Senate is a chamber of the bicameral United States Congress; it is the upper house, and the U.S. House of Representatives is the lower house.

description: sea between Europe, Africa and Asia
description_wiki: The Mediterranean Sea ( MED-ih-tə-RAY-nee-ən) is an intercontinental sea situated between Europe, Asia, and Africa.

description: item in the National Archives and Records Administration's holdings
1954 Forrestal-class aircraft carrier
American politician (1936–2018)
description_wiki: John Sidney McCain III (August 29, 1936 – August 25, 2018) was an American politician and naval officer who represented Arizona in the United States Congress for over 35 years, first as a U.S. representative from 1983 to 1987, then as a U.S. senator from 1987 until his death in 2018.

description: high school in Park Ridge, Illinois, United States
description_wiki: Maine East High School, or Maine East, and officially Maine Township High School East, is a public four-year high school located at the corner of Dempster Street and Potter Road in Park Ridge, Illinois, a northwest suburb of Chicago, in the United States.

description: island group of the Caribbean Leeward Islands
description_wiki: The Virgin Islands (Spanish: Islas Vírgenes) is an archipelago between the North Atlantic Ocean and northeastern Caribbean Sea, located to the immediate east of the main island of Puerto Rico.

description: island country in East Asia
description_wiki: Japan is an island country in East Asia.

description: city and special administrative region of China
description_wiki: Hong Kong is a special administrative region of China.

description: archipelagic country in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: The Philippines, officially the Republic of the Philippines, is an archipelagic country in Southeast Asia.

description: country in southwestern Europe with territories in Africa
description_wiki: Spain, officially the Kingdom of Spain, is a country in Southern and Western Europe with territories in North Africa.

description: country in southern Europe
description_wiki: Italy, officially the Italian Republic, is a country in Southern and Western Europe.

description: island in the Mediterranean, region of Italy
description_wiki: Sicily (Italian and Sicilian: Sicilia), officially the Sicilian Region, is an island in the central Mediterranean Sea and one of the twenty regions of Italy, situated south of the Italian Peninsula in continental Europe.

aliases: Free Associated State of Puerto Rico
description: unincorporated territory of the United States of America
description_wiki: Puerto Rico (abbreviated PR), officially the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, is a self-governing Caribbean archipelago and island organized as an unincorporated territory of the United States under the designation of commonwealth.

aliases: 2-(2,4-dichlorophenoxy)acetic acid butyl ester;2-(2,4,5-trichlorophenoxy)acetic acid butyl ester
description: military herbicide
description_wiki: Agent Orange is a chemical herbicide and defoliant, one of the tactical uses of Rainbow Herbicides.

description: maritime land force service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Marine Corps (USMC), also referred to as the United States Marines or simply the Marines, is the naval infantry service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: air service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Air Force (USAF) is the air service branch of the United States Armed Forces.
